Reporting & Visibility

Finance-grade visibility across your travel program

Give travel, finance, procurement, and leadership teams a clear picture of spend, compliance, exceptions, and operational activity across the organisation.

💰

Spend Visibility

Understand travel spend across entities, teams, travellers, suppliers, and booking channels. Segment and slice the data to answer the questions that matter to finance and procurement.

✅

Compliance Reporting

Track what proportion of travel is in-policy, out-of-policy, or subject to approved exceptions. Give compliance and finance teams the data they need to review and report on policy performance.

⚠️

Exception Monitoring

Track where exceptions are occurring, who is approving them, and whether patterns are forming. Surface exception trends before they become systemic issues.

📤

Export-Ready Data

Get data out of the platform into finance systems, ERP workflows, BI tools, or procurement reporting. Structured outputs designed for downstream use.

Visibility for every stakeholder

TMCs

  • Visibility across client accounts
  • Servicing conversation data
  • Portfolio-level reporting
  • Operational issue surfacing

Corporate Clients

  • Spend and policy performance
  • Approval outcomes by team
  • Exception trends
  • Finance-ready outputs

Government

  • Stronger oversight records
  • Defensible reporting trails
  • Audit-ready visibility
  • Policy adherence data

Enterprise

  • Cross-entity visibility
  • Business unit segmentation
  • Leadership dashboards
  • Procurement reporting

Cinturon360 is coming soon

Cinturon360 is an upcoming travel governance and visibility platform designed to work with existing booking channels, apply policy and approvals, and deliver finance-grade reporting. Join the waitlist to follow the launch.

Join Waitlist Book a Demo
